title: Xtra Juicy Turkish Lentils Mercimek Corbasi
description: A sour and juicy Turkish dish made with red lentils and fennel seeds, served in a tajine clay vessel, suitable for a solo dinner and Buddhist temple friendly.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large tajine clay vessel over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the fennel seeds and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the red lentils, water, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 30 minutes.
Remove the vessel from the heat and let it cool slightly.
Serve the mercimek corbasi hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
